zh.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward於大約1460年出生在英國。她至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1505年在她的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward于大约1460年出生在英国。她至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1505年在她的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heyward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward was born about 1460, in England. She had at least 1 daughter. She died about 1505, in her hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward est née environ 1460, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1505, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward wurde um 1460 in England geboren. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1505 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward è nata il circa 1460 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1505, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heywardは約1460年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1505年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward(은)는 대략 1460년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1505년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1460–about 1505: tany ho any amin'ny 1460–tany ho any amin'ny 1505

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1505, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward родилась около 1460 г. в местности Англия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1505 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

sm.about 1460–about 1505: e tusa o le 1460–e tusa o le 1505

es.lifeSummary: Lady Baroness Jane Heyward nació aproximadamente 1460, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1505, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
